title: Journals GET schema
description: A schema for fetching specific journal.

minimumVoucherNumber.description: Minimum voucher number defined in settings.

maximumVoucherNumber.description: Maximum voucher number defined in settings.

entryTypeRestrictedTo.description: Allowed entry type on given journal.

contraAccounts.description: Default contra account for given entry type

customerPayments.description: Default contra account for the customer payment

accountNumber.description: Account number used for registering customer payment entry type

self.description: The unique self reference of the account resource.

supplierPayments.description: Default contra account for the supplier payment

accountNumber.description: Account number used for registering supplier payment entry type

self.description: The unique self reference of the account resource.

financeVouchers.description: Default contra account for the finance voucher

accountNumber.description: Account number used for registering finance voucher entry type

self.description: The unique self reference of the account resource.

vouchers.description: A link to the collection of vouchers on the given journal, categorized according to the type.

entries.description: A link to the collection of entries on the given journal, regardless of their type.

financeVoucher.description: The unique reference to the finance voucher template

manualCustomerInvoice.description: The unique reference to the manual customer invoice template

self.description: A unique link reference to the templates resource.
The unique self reference of the jounrnals collection.
